---
title: "Royal Nord"
description: "A custom Positron & VS Code theme for R users, based on Nord & Obsidian."
date: "2024-12-25"
categories: ["VS Code", "Positron", "Custom Theme"]
image: image-listing.png
format:
  html: 
    code-links:
      - text: "Repo"
        icon: github
        href: https://github.com/ozanozbeker/royal-nord
---
